column1: # The dependency graph for Layer 1 (runtime) substrate chunks. Each
# row declares one chunk + its tier + its Hβ § citation + its imports
# (must be defined in priors). build.sh assembles per this order;
# future drift-audit verifies imports resolve before chunk lands.
# Per the eight interrogations on Hβ.runtime structure:
#   Graph?       — this file IS the dep graph (each row = one node + edges)
#   Handler?     — build.sh is the assembler-handler reading this
#   Verb?        — chunk concatenation is `|>` per row order
#   Row?         — each chunk's "uses" column declares its symbol-row
#   Ownership?   — each chunk OWNS its exports; consumers `ref` them
#   Refinement?  — Hβ § cite IS the per-chunk refinement contract
#   Gradient?    — each row added unlocks one substrate capability
#   Reason?      — hβ_section + commit message records why each landed
#   0 — depends on Layer 0 shell only ($heap_ptr, $heap_base, WASI imports)
# Status markers per the residue tracker convention:
# When new chunks land, append row + commit. Drift-audit (future) will
# verify ordering is consistent + imports resolve in priors.
